message:
style(tests): refactor tmux capture to idiomatic let-else and clone_from

Applies two clippy-recommended improvements to the tmux test helper:

tests/common/tmux.rs:
- Replaced match-on-Option pattern in wait_for_pane_contains() and
  wait_for_pane_contains_any() with idiomatic let-else syntax:
  `let Some(pane) = self.try_capture_pane() else { ... };`
  This reduces nesting and makes the early-return path more readable
- Replaced `last_pane = pane.clone()` with `last_pane.clone_from(&pane)`
  in both methods, which reuses the existing String allocation instead of
  dropping and reallocating on every poll iteration — avoids unnecessary
  allocator churn during the tight 50ms polling loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
